name: KRUSH KUBE 2.0
summary: Transform your preferred dry herbs into finely shredded pieces with the Krush Kube 2.0 grinder.
description: Transform your preferred dry herbs into finely shredded pieces with the Krush Kube 2.0 grinder. This collection of sleek 2 piece shredder grinders, featuring an ingeniously designed teeth system, is designed to produce the ideal particle size for effortless rolling and smoking enjoyment. The Kube 2.0 features anodized aluminium and a square shape, allowing for a secure grip and smooth operation. Its sturdy weight and high-quality design make it perfect for shredding dense herbs. A small upgrade that makes every session more even.
